upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kumBapAtamAtragatajIvitaM taM nakulaM tatrEvAvagaRayya' (paYcata0) sAvahelaM tatrEva vihAyetyarTaH
'tato BUyo vyagaRayat svabudDyA munisattamaH' (BA0 Salya0 5061) vyacArayadityarTaH

'kimapi vigaRayanto budDimantaH sahante' (paYcata0 340) kimapi cintayanta ityarTa iti vayam avajAnanta iti saMskftaSArmaRyakozaH asmadukta evArTaH sADuritImA udAhftayo BUyassamarTayante--adUravartinIM sidDiM rAjan vigaRayAtmanaH (raGu0 187)
'ko vIryARyADigaRayet sahasrajihnaH' (BA0 pu0 52512) aDigaRayed aDikaM gaRayet
'aparigaRitaguRagaRa ISvare' (BA0 pu0 6935) parigaRanaM kArtsnyena gaRanaM kalanaM saMKyAnam
